headline: Pool Corporation Reports First Quarter Results and Confirms Annual Earnings Guidance Range
summary: Q1 2026 Highlights: Net sales increased 6%, driven by strong maintenance product sales and improvement in discretionary categoriesGross margin of 29.0%, down 20 bps year-over-year, driven by increased early buy activity and seasonal mix in the first quarterOperating income increased 7% to $82.6 million; operating margin expanded 10 bps to 7.3%Diluted EPS of $1.45, an increase of 2%, or an increase of 8% without ASU 2016-09 tax benefitsConfirms annual earnings guidance range of $10.87 - $11.17 pe

content.title: Pool Corporation Reports First Quarter Results and Confirms Annual Earnings Guidance Range
content.summary: Q1 2026 Highlights: Net sales increased 6%, driven by strong maintenance product sales and improvement in discretionary categoriesGross margin of 29.0%, down 20 bps year-over-year, driven by increased early buy activity and seasonal mix in the first quarterOperating income increased 7% to $82.6 million; operating margin expanded 10 bps to 7.3%Diluted EPS of $1.45, an increase of 2%, or an increase of 8% without ASU 2016-09 tax benefitsConfirms annual earnings guidance range of $10.87 - $11.17 pe
